name: Mastodon
description: Browse timelines, post toots, reply, boost, favourite, and monitor hashtags on any Mastodon instance. Works with mastodon.social, fosstodon.org, and any ActivityPub instance. Requires Mastodon OAuth configured in the APIs page.

schedules.name: mastodon-hashtag-watch
schedules.description: Every 30 minutes: fetches new toots for all monitored hashtags.

examples: Show me my Mastodon home timeline
What's new in my monitored Mastodon hashtags?

commands.name: mastodon
commands.description: Use the mastodon_timeline tool with type 'home' and limit 15 to fetch the latest toots. Present them in a clean reading format: author handle, content, boost/favourite counts. If the user monitors hashtags, also check mastodon_watched_hashtags for new content and mention highlights.

commands.name: toot
commands.description: Use the text provided by the user after the command as the toot content. If no text is given, ask what they want to post. Use the mastodon_post tool to publish the toot. Confirm the toot URL after posting successfully.
